title: Audio Guide runtime architecture
description: FastAPI to ADK, retrieval, and TTS in one live request path.

runtimeComponents.notes: Firebase-protected route accepts lat, long, base64Image, and topics.
Runs the shipped sequential pipeline and extracts the final text payload.
Finds nearby landmarks and neighborhood context outside prompt text.
Queries collection `langchain` over HTTP with top_k from settings.
Cleans generated text, writes MP3 under storage, returns base64 audio_bytes.
Accepted by the API, but not consumed by the live ADK runtime yet.

sharpEdges.where: RetrieveRequest accepts topics, runtime does not use them
sharpEdges.mitigation: Thread topics into ImageDescriptor or ContentGenerator prompt state.

sharpEdges.where: ADK message construction assumes JPEG-compatible bytes
sharpEdges.mitigation: Detect MIME or normalize images at the HTTP boundary.

sharpEdges.where: ChromaDB quality depends on manual ingestion state
sharpEdges.mitigation: Keep fixture landmarks and retrieval smoke cases.

props.text: The live backend is a single request pipeline: authenticate, identify the landmark with image plus coordinates, retrieve grounded context, format strict JSON, synthesize MP3, and return text plus audio.

props.label: Runtime tools
props.caption: Maps and Chroma stay out of prompt text

props.label: Known gap
props.caption: Field exists but is not wired into generation

props.title: End-to-end request path
props.description: This is the shipped flow described by the backend docs, not a future-state rewrite.

props.title: Photo + coordinates → grounded audio guide
props.caption: The final response is JSON with title, content, isInvalidRequest, and base64 MP3 audio_bytes.

items.label: client
items.title: Photo + location
items.description: Client sends base64Image, lat, long, and optional topics.

items.label: server/main.py
items.title: FastAPI + Firebase
items.description: Request enters /retrieve and protected endpoints require a valid Firebase JWT.

items.label: retrieve.py
items.title: Runtime handoff
items.description: Request data is passed into process_request and the ADK runner.

items.label: root_agent.py
items.title: Sequential ADK agents
items.description: ImageDescriptor, ContentGenerator, and JsonFormatter run in order.

items.label: tools.py
items.title: Maps + Chroma tools
items.description: Nearby landmarks, neighborhood, and related documents are stored in session state.

items.label: tts_client.py
items.title: MP3 synthesis
items.description: Cleaned text becomes MP3 and is returned as base64 audio_bytes.
